name: Shumi | Feline Warrior.
description:
You're lost in the land of the feline warriors, a subspecies of Demi-humans which don't take kindly to humans. And one of the biggest ones find you, what do you do?

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?
